description: Refactor beadwork output to use tokenized markdown as the canonical format. Render functions produce markdown with semantic tokens ({status:}, {p:}, {id:}, etc.). Two resolution passes produce final output: ResolveMarkdown() for agents (clean markdown) and ResolveTTY() for humans (wrapped, ANSI-colored). Replaces custom HTML-comment template DSL with Go text/template. Extracts design docs from prompt comments into docs/. Adds blocked status icon and next-action suggestions on close. Includes --raw flag for dumping tokenized text (integration tests, debugging).
title: Markdown-native output with tokenized rendering
